_comment: FAST Mutation Profile — blocking CI gate for pull requests.
Targets critical core logic with verified test coverage. Runtime target: < 5 minutes.
- State machine (run-state): core transitions, validation, retry logic — 100% score
- Secret manager (shared): secret resolution, masking, redaction — 73% score
- Utilities (shared): redaction, branch naming — partial coverage
Excluded due to 0% direct unit test coverage (integration-tested only):
- DB schema/connection/constants, label-lifecycle, errors, cancel-run, logger
- These files are still type-safe via npm run typecheck and integration-tested.
CHECKER: typescriptChecker DEACTIVATED (see stryker.config.json for rationale).
